fact.it: Il nome originale era "Mocha", poi "LiveScript" e infine "JavaScript" — una scelta di marketing per cavalcare l'hype di Java.
fact.en: The original name was "Mocha", then "LiveScript" and finally "JavaScript" — a marketing move to ride the Java hype wave.

lastWin.repoDesc: A playable Slot Machine for GitHub Profiles powered by Python, GitHub Actions, and animated SVGs.
